input.string: this is WIP and just a backend for now (will have frontend graph editor next time), which I started last night and I will use this as my everyday tool, but can you see any potential in this as a super competitive portfolio-worthy project here in PH? For context I want to be a fullstack web dev with LLM integration not just glorified ChatGPT wrapper, and I want to make tools that I can also use. But most importantly, I dont think of words like scalability or design patterns as I need to have fun while making it.
